Latest Episodes

FRESH OFF THE MIC

Raw conversations with the people building the construction industry from the ground up.

Episode 001
From Framing Crews to $10M Contracts — The Journey
How one contractor went from swinging a hammer to managing multi-million dollar commercial projects in just 6 years.
48 minBusiness
Episode 002
Paul Rubio: Private Jets & Billionaire Mindsets
Paul reveals the reality of the A-to-Z jet business and why he targets the wealthiest individuals on the planet. Far beyond aviation.
62 minMindset
Episode 003
The Real Cost of Growth: Lessons From the Trenches
Raw and unfiltered conversation about what it actually costs — financially and personally — to grow a construction company.
54 minGrowth
Episode 004
Building Systems That Scale Without You
How top contractors are removing themselves from daily operations and building businesses that run without them on every job site.
71 minSystems
Episode 005
The Policy Architect: Andrew Slocum
Andrew Slocum breaks down how policy decisions shape the construction landscape and what builders need to know to stay ahead.
58 minPolicy
Episode 006
The $300,000 Breakup: Kent Speakman & Alaina Feister
An honest conversation about a $300K business fallout, what went wrong, and what both sides learned from the split.
65 minBusiness
Episode 007
Designing with Flow with Ellada Mesveliani
Interior design meets construction strategy. Ellada shares how intentional design creates spaces that sell, lease, and inspire.
52 minDesign

About the Show

MORE THAN A PODCAST

DrewCode HQ was born in the field — by builders, for builders. Hosted by Andrew Robles, President & CEO of Foundational Builders Corp., we don't just talk theory. We dig into the real numbers, real mistakes, and real wins that define what it means to build a business in this industry.

Weekly Episodes

New conversations every week featuring contractors, developers, suppliers, and industry disruptors.

Built by Builders

Hosted by Andrew Robles — a working contractor who's managed everything from residential remodels to large-scale commercial builds across CA, AZ & FL.

Media Meets Business

The podcast is the engine — we use it to spotlight partners, create leads, and grow the entire DrewCode & FB Corp ecosystem.

Guest Applications

BE ON THE SHOW

Think you belong on DrewCode HQ?

We're always looking for real stories from people in the trenches — contractors, developers, suppliers, and industry experts who have something worth saying. No fluff, no pitches. Just real talk.

Fill out the form and our team will review your application within 5 business days.

  • 1
    Submit your application with as much detail as possible about your story and expertise.
  • 2
    Our production team reviews and reaches out to schedule a quick pre-interview call.
  • 3
    We confirm your recording date and send you everything you need to prepare.
  • 4
    You join Drew live (remote or in-studio) and we tell your story to 85K+ builders.

Submissions go directly to [email protected] — we review every application personally.

✓

APPLICATION RECEIVED!

Thanks for applying. Andrew will personally review your story and reach out within 5 business days if you're a great fit.

STAY IN THE LOOP

New episodes, guest announcements, and industry intel — straight to your inbox.
